tasks.label: 🚀 Dev: Start Server
tasks.command: docker compose up --build
tasks.detail: Build dev image & start with hot-reload on :8080

tasks.label: 🚀 Dev: Start Server (Background)
tasks.command: docker compose up -d --build
tasks.detail: Start the server in background (for preLaunchTask)

tasks.label: 🔄 Dev: Restart Server
tasks.command: docker compose restart api

tasks.label: ⏹️ Dev: Stop Server
tasks.command: docker compose down --remove-orphans
tasks.detail: Stop all containers and remove orphans

tasks.label: 🪵 Dev: Logs (follow)
tasks.command: docker compose logs -f --tail 100 api

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Run All
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short
tasks.detail: Run full pytest suite inside the container

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Health Only
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m pytest tests/test_health.py -v

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Auth Only
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m pytest tests/test_auth.py -v

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Compile Only
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m pytest tests/test_compile.py -v

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: With Coverage
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --cov=app --cov-report=term-missing

tasks.label: 🧪 Test: Compile All Samples
tasks.command: bash scripts/test_samples.sh
tasks.detail: Compile all test_samples/ against local API → test_outputs/

tasks.label: 🔍 Lint: Check
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m ruff check app/ tests/

tasks.label: 🔍 Lint: Fix
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m ruff check app/ tests/ --fix

tasks.label: 🔍 Format: Check
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m ruff format --check app/ tests/

tasks.label: 🔍 Format: Apply
tasks.command: docker compose exec api python3 -m ruff format app/ tests/

tasks.label: 🏗️ Docker: Build Dev Image
tasks.command: docker compose build --no-cache
tasks.detail: Force rebuild dev image from scratch

tasks.label: 🏗️ Docker: Build Prod Image
tasks.command: docker build -t texlive-api:local -f Dockerfile .
tasks.detail: Build production image locally for testing

tasks.label: 🧹 Docker: Prune
tasks.command: docker system prune -f && docker image prune -f

tasks.label: 📊 Docker: Stats
tasks.command: docker stats --no-stream

tasks.label: 🚀 Deploy: Push to Docker Hub
tasks.command: echo 'Tag and push:' && read -p 'Docker Hub username: ' DH_USER && docker tag texlive-api:local $DH_USER/texlive-api:latest && docker push $DH_USER/texlive-api:latest
tasks.detail: Tag and push prod image to Docker Hub

tasks.label: 🚀 Deploy: SSH to Oracle VM
tasks.command: echo 'Enter Oracle VM IP:' && read -p 'IP: ' VM_IP && ssh ubuntu@$VM_IP
tasks.detail: Open SSH session to production VM

tasks.label: 🩺 Health: Local
tasks.command: curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/health | python3 -m json.tool

tasks.label: 🩺 Quick Compile: Local
tasks.command: curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/compile -H 'X-API-Key: dev-key-4523636' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"source": "\\documentclass{article}\\begin{document}Hello!\\end{document}"}' -o /tmp/test.pdf && echo 'PDF saved to /tmp/test.pdf' && file /tmp/test.pdf
tasks.detail: Quick compile test and save PDF

tasks.label: 📋 Setup: Copy .env
tasks.command: cp -n .env.example .env && echo '.env created — edit API_KEYS before starting' || echo '.env already exists'
